Let's double-check all task targets: 1. 在 OMEdit 中搭建一个一阶热系统: done (components `HeatCapacitor`, `ThermalConductor`, `PrescribedTemperature`, `Step` were used and connected). 2. 设置初始温度与环境温度阶跃变化: done (`C=10, G=1, T.start=293.15, Step.height=10, startTime=5`). 3. 运行仿真 (StopTime=20): done (simulated and showed Plot till 20s). 4. 导出温度随时间的曲线数据: done (exported variables to `/home/user/Desktop/output/OpenModelica_Case03_Temperature.csv`). Everything is fulfilled successfully! I will now end the sequence.
